name: Italian Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, sugar, shortening, baking powder, and anise. Mix well using hands.
2. Mix eggs, milk, and vanilla extract. Add to dry ingredients, continuing to work with hands until smooth. Do not knead.
3. Using a cookie press, form dough through a large star into a long strip. Cut into 1 1/2 to 2-inch pieces.
4. Alternatively, roll the dough into walnut-sized balls and flatten them to 1 1/2 to 2 inches.
5. Dip the top of each piece in a mixture of egg white and 1/2 teaspoon water beaten together.
6. Roll each piece in sesame seeds.
7. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 375 degrees for 10 minutes, or until golden.
